entries.title: Ephraim the Syrian on Genesis 25
entries.excerpt: Since no law of virginity and chastity had yet been given, so that desire might not put any stain upon the soul of the righteous man, and since it had been said to Abraham that kings and nations would come from him, of which God also testified that He knew how Abraham would charge his sons and his sons’ sons to keep His commandments — after the death of Sarah Abraham took a concubine, with the aim that his many sons, scattering through many lands of all the earth, might by their piety spread the knowledge and honoring of the one God.…
